problem_statement: A historical replay produces zero NBBO-qualified candidates on a date known to contain quotes. Diagnose the causal family without loosening trading gates.

observations.statement: A read-only count shows the replay date has 3,912 quote rows in the ingestion source but zero rows in the relation queried by the evaluator.
Source tracing shows ingestion persists replay quotes through one repository while the evaluator reads a different sink repository with no transfer step between them.
An isolated adapter that reads the populated source restores NBBO-qualified candidates with the same code revision, fixture, thresholds, and simulated clock.
